query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_opportunities,
  AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as avg_arbitrage_percentage,
  MAX(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as max_arbitrage_percentage,
  MIN(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as min_arbitrage_percentage,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 END) as active_opportunities,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'expired' THEN 1 END) as expired_opportunities,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_opportunities
FROM arbitrage_opportunities;

SELECT 
  sport,
  COUNT(*) as opportunities_count,
  AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as avg_edge,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 END) as active_count
FROM arbitrage_opportunities
GROUP BY sport
ORDER BY opportunities_count DESC;

SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as date,
  COUNT(*) as opportunities_found,
  AVG(CAST(arbitragePercentage AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as avg_edge
FROM arbitrage_opportunities
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY date DESC;
